description: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs nx lint and nx build browser-extension on every push and PR. Ensures the repo never has a broken build merged to main. Can be extended later with nx affected to only run on changed projects.
title: Add GitHub Actions CI (lint + build on push/PR)

close_reason: Removed Nx boilerplate (src/app, src/main.tsx, index.html). Wired webextension-polyfill into background service worker. nx build succeeds — popup, background, content, and manifest.json all output to dist/. Extension is loadable as an unpacked Chrome extension.
description: Create a minimal manifest.json targeting MV3 with a popup entry. Install webextension-polyfill for Chrome/Firefox API normalization. Build a minimal React popup (popup/index.tsx) that renders 'Hello World'. Acceptance criteria: nx build browser-extension succeeds and loading the dist/ as an unpacked extension in Chrome shows the Hello World popup.
title: Add MV3 manifest, webextension-polyfill, and Hello World popup

close_reason: Scaffolded libs/core (scope:core) and libs/shared (scope:shared) with @nx/js. Updated depConstraints in root .eslintrc.json to enforce app→core/shared, core→shared, shared→nothing. nx lint passes across all 3 projects.
description: Generate placeholder libs/core and libs/shared libraries using @nx/js. Configure @nx/enforce-module-boundaries ESLint rule to enforce that apps can import from libs, but libs/shared cannot import from libs/core, etc. Establishes the import boundary architecture before any real code is written.
title: Scaffold empty libs/core and libs/shared with module boundary rules

close_reason: Nx 22.5.1 workspace initialized with ts preset. apps/ and libs/ dirs created. npm install complete. .gitignore updated.
description: Run nx init or create-nx-workspace with the ts preset inside the existing repo. Target structure: apps/, libs/. This is the foundation all other setup tasks depend on.
title: Initialize Nx workspace (ts preset) inside current repo

close_reason: ESLint + Prettier configured at workspace root. @nx/eslint, @nx/eslint-plugin, @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin all installed. @nx/enforce-module-boundaries wired. nx lint passes.
description: Wire up ESLint and Prettier via Nx's built-in tooling (@nx/eslint). Configure workspace-root-level rules including @nx/enforce-module-boundaries to establish import boundaries from day one. Should be done before any application code is written.
title: Configure ESLint + Prettier at workspace root

close_reason: Scaffolded apps/browser-extension with @nx/react, Vite, TypeScript, ESLint. nx lint and nx build both pass.
description: Use @nx/vite and @nx/react to generate the browser-extension app inside apps/. Configure TypeScript, set up the Vite config skeleton, and confirm nx build browser-extension runs without errors.
title: Create apps/browser-extension Nx app with Vite + React + TypeScript

description: 5 high severity vulnerabilities exist in minimatch via Nx 22.5.1. Before modifying any package versions manually, use 'nx migrate' first to let Nx manage its own version upgrades and migration scripts correctly. Only fall back to manual version edits if nx migrate cannot resolve the issue.
title: Address npm audit vulnerabilities in Nx dependencies

description: Install and configure Vitest via @nx/vite. Add a workspace-level test configuration and confirm nx test runs. This unblocks writing unit tests for the crypto module (the highest-risk piece of the project) as soon as that work begins.
title: Set up Vitest for the workspace

close_reason: Installed vite-plugin-web-extension and webextension-polyfill. Updated vite.config.mts to use the plugin with src/manifest.json. Created MV3 manifest with popup, background service worker, and content script entry points. nx build produces all 3 chunks plus manifest.json.
description: Install and configure vite-plugin-web-extension in apps/browser-extension. Set up the Vite config to handle MV3 multiple entry points: popup, background service worker, and content script. Confirm the plugin correctly drives the build from manifest.json.
title: Configure vite-plugin-web-extension for MV3 multi-entry-point build
